name: The Starblood Stalkers
inspire: After your opponent's Power step, if your warband holds 3 or more treasure tokens, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Skink Agility
reactions.trigger: Immediately after you make a Save roll as part of a melee Attack for a friendly Skink ({icon:minion}) with no Charge tokens in friendly territory
reactions.flavorText: Dexterous and nimble, the skinks of the Starblood Stalkers are capable of slipping away from danger with remarkable speed.
reactions.rulesText: you can re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll.

abilities.name: The Diviner
abilities.flavorText: Kixi-Taka's cosmic powers allow him to foresee potential reward - or call down heavenly doom.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a feature token within 3 hexes of your leader ({icon:leader}). Either flip that feature token or inflict 1 damage on an enemy fighter on or adjacent to that feature token. This ability can only be used once per battle round.

abilities.name: The Bulwark Celestial
abilities.flavorText: These most resolute of cosmic conjunctions infuse the Seraphon with a similarly firm endurance.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Friendly fighters cannot be driven back until the end of the battle round or until any player uses an Asterism ({icon:hex}) ability. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: The Great Drake
abilities.flavorText: Ascendant constellations of almighty Dracothion grant the Starblood Stalkers' weapons a cosmic power.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Friendly fighters' melee weapons have +1 Attack dice until the end of the battle round or until any player uses an Asterism ({icon:hex}) ability. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: The Hunter's Steed
abilities.flavorText: As the stars of the steed rise to dominate the heavens, predatory speed infuses the Stalkers.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Friendly fighters have +1 Move until the end of the battle round or until any player uses an Asterism ({icon:hex}) ability. You can only use this ability once per game.
